headline: AppLovin (APP) Opens AppLovin Ads To All Advertisers After Axon Rebrand
summary: AppLovin (NasdaqGS:APP) has rebranded its Axon advertising platform as AppLovin Ads. The company has removed referral code requirements, opening its ad technology to all advertisers globally. The shift broadens access beyond mobile gaming and is intended to support a wider range of digital ad campaigns. AppLovin operates at the intersection of app monetization, marketing tools, and advertising technology, with roots in mobile gaming. Digital advertisers across sectors are looking for ways...
